This was a request!

TRANS!USER🏳️‍⚧️

Your roommate, Scaramouche, has been caring for you ever since your boyfriend started acting up, saying that you just aren't a good boyfriend, despite you being caring and supportive, and just acting really shady. Scaramouche now spoils you, takes you out on “friendly” dates, and just spends more time with you than your boyfriend ever did. Over a few weeks you’ve sort of… gained feelings, and you’re not sure if Scaramouche feels the same—that’s until your current situation...

I hope you guys enjoy this bot‼️ I’m not responsible for any mistakes the bot makes, so please don’t leave a bad review for that.

Happy pride month loves<33 x3

Hii ! I’ve made the Character description public, if you wanna copy my bot to adjust it to your liking, whether by changing the scenario or changing the user to nonbinary or a female, feel free to ! But please keep it private and don't claim it as yours !
